reference: Yes, you can get pregnant. Please go to your gynecologist and take Clomiphene or Letrozole from day two. Then, conduct a follicular study. If needed, she will give you injections of gonadotropins until the follicle size is eighteen mm, then it will rupture. After that, maintain a sexual relationship.
text: Yes, you can get pregnant. Please go to your gynecologist and take clomiphene or let resolve from day two. Then conduct a follicular study. If needed, she will give you injections of gonadotropins until the follicle size is eighteen millimeters. Then it will rupture. After that, maintain a sexual relationship.
